answer_text.description: The direct response to the user. Clear and complete. May reference screen content, audio, or web results if they were provided.

modalities_used.description: Which input modalities substantively informed this answer.

note_compact.description: One compact sentence (max 120 chars) for the rolling memory buffer. Must be self-contained and meaningful out of context. Empty string if nothing worth retaining.

note_full.description: Full detail paragraph for the daily journal. Include what the user asked, what context was present (screen/audio/web), what was discussed, and what was decided or found. 2-5 sentences.

context_tags.description: 3-6 topic keywords describing this turn for future retrieval.
